languages.text: {n}Вы реагируете быстрее — женщина не успевает нажать на спусковой крючок. Выстрел оставляет в ее туловище уродливую рваную дыру. Стоит побыстрее покинуть место преступления, за убийство наследницы без свидетелей наказание одно — казнь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы реагируете быстрее — женщина не успевает нажать на спусковой крючок. Выстрел оставляет в ее туловище уродливую рваную дыру. Стоит побыстрее покинуть место преступления, за убийство наследницы без свидетелей наказание одно — казнь.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Your reflexes are faster, giving Juvenna no time even to pull the trigger. Your shot leaves a gruesome, ragged hole in her torso. You should depart the scene of the crime as quickly as possible: there can be only one punishment for killing an heiress in cold blood — death.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы реагируете быстрее — женщина не успевает нажать на спусковой крючок. Выстрел оставляет в ее туловище уродливую рваную дыру. Стоит побыстрее покинуть место преступления, за убийство наследницы без свидетелей наказание одно — казнь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your reflexes are faster, giving Juvenna no time even to pull the trigger. Your shot leaves a gruesome, ragged hole in her torso. You should depart the scene of the crime as quickly as possible: there can be only one punishment for killing an heiress in cold blood — death.{/n}

{n}Your reflexes are faster, giving Juvenna no time even to pull the trigger. Your shot leaves a gruesome, ragged hole in her torso. You should depart the scene of the crime as quickly as possible: there can be only one punishment for killing an heiress in cold blood — death.{/n}

{n}Your reflexes are faster, giving Juvenna no time even to pull the trigger. Your shot leaves a gruesome, ragged hole in her torso. You should depart the scene of the crime as quickly as possible: there can be only one punishment for killing an heiress in cold blood — death.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tus reflejos son más rápidos y no das tiempo a Juvenna para que apriete el gatillo. Tu disparo abre un agujero espantoso en su torso. Abandonas la escena del crimen lo antes posible: la muerte es el único castigo posible por matar a una heredera a sangre fría.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your reflexes are faster, giving Juvenna no time even to pull the trigger. Your shot leaves a gruesome, ragged hole in her torso. You should depart the scene of the crime as quickly as possible: there can be only one punishment for killing an heiress in cold blood — death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus reflejos son más rápidos y no das tiempo a Juvenna para que apriete el gatillo. Tu disparo abre un agujero espantoso en su torso. Abandonas la escena del crimen lo antes posible: la muerte es el único castigo posible por matar a una heredera a sangre fría.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的反应更快。尤文娜甚至来不及扣动扳机，你的子弹就已在她的躯干上撕开一个狰狞的血洞。你最好立刻离开犯罪现场。无情地杀害一位继承人，等待你的只有一个下场：死刑。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your reflexes are faster, giving Juvenna no time even to pull the trigger. Your shot leaves a gruesome, ragged hole in her torso. You should depart the scene of the crime as quickly as possible: there can be only one punishment for killing an heiress in cold blood — death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的反应更快。尤文娜甚至来不及扣动扳机，你的子弹就已在她的躯干上撕开一个狰狞的血洞。你最好立刻离开犯罪现场。无情地杀害一位继承人，等待你的只有一个下场：死刑。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous la prenez de court, et Juvenna n'a même pas le temps d'appuyer sur la gâchette. Votre tir laisse dans sa poitrine un trou béant bordé de chairs déchiquetées. Vous feriez mieux de quitter le lieu du crime au plus vite, car le meurtre d'une héritière n'est passible que d'une seule sanction : la mort.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your reflexes are faster, giving Juvenna no time even to pull the trigger. Your shot leaves a gruesome, ragged hole in her torso. You should depart the scene of the crime as quickly as possible: there can be only one punishment for killing an heiress in cold blood — death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous la prenez de court, et Juvenna n'a même pas le temps d'appuyer sur la gâchette. Votre tir laisse dans sa poitrine un trou béant bordé de chairs déchiquetées. Vous feriez mieux de quitter le lieu du crime au plus vite, car le meurtre d'une héritière n'est passible que d'une seule sanction : la mort.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Reflekslerin öyle hızlı ki Juvenna'ya tetiği çekmesi için bile zaman tanımıyor. Atışın; vücudunda korkunç, pürüzlü bir delik bırakıyor. Suç mahallinden bir an önce uzaklaşmalısın. Bir vârisi soğukkanlılıkla öldürmenin tek bir cezası olabilir: Ölüm.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your reflexes are faster, giving Juvenna no time even to pull the trigger. Your shot leaves a gruesome, ragged hole in her torso. You should depart the scene of the crime as quickly as possible: there can be only one punishment for killing an heiress in cold blood — death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Reflekslerin öyle hızlı ki Juvenna'ya tetiği çekmesi için bile zaman tanımıyor. Atışın; vücudunda korkunç, pürüzlü bir delik bırakıyor. Suç mahallinden bir an önce uzaklaşmalısın. Bir vârisi soğukkanlılıkla öldürmenin tek bir cezası olabilir: Ölüm.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Reflexe sind schneller und lassen Juvenna keine Zeit, abzudrücken. Dein Schuss reißt ein schreckliches Loch in ihren Oberkörper. Du solltest den Ort des Verbrechens so schnell wie möglich verlassen: Für die kaltblütige Ermordung einer Thronfolgerin kann es nur eine Strafe geben ... den Tod.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your reflexes are faster, giving Juvenna no time even to pull the trigger. Your shot leaves a gruesome, ragged hole in her torso. You should depart the scene of the crime as quickly as possible: there can be only one punishment for killing an heiress in cold blood — death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Reflexe sind schneller und lassen Juvenna keine Zeit, abzudrücken. Dein Schuss reißt ein schreckliches Loch in ihren Oberkörper. Du solltest den Ort des Verbrechens so schnell wie möglich verlassen: Für die kaltblütige Ermordung einer Thronfolgerin kann es nur eine Strafe geben ... den Tod.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの反射神経が速く、ジュベナは引き金を引く暇もなかった。あなたの銃弾は彼女の胴体にひどい傷跡を残した。冷酷に相続人を殺した罪には、死刑しかあるまい。この現場をできるだけ早く離れよう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your reflexes are faster, giving Juvenna no time even to pull the trigger. Your shot leaves a gruesome, ragged hole in her torso. You should depart the scene of the crime as quickly as possible: there can be only one punishment for killing an heiress in cold blood — death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの反射神経が速く、ジュベナは引き金を引く暇もなかった。あなたの銃弾は彼女の胴体にひどい傷跡を残した。冷酷に相続人を殺した罪には、死刑しかあるまい。この現場をできるだけ早く離れよう。{/n}
